title: Dr Katsuragi and His Super Solenoids
display_title: Dr Katsuragi and His Super Solenoids
wikitext:
[]: Dr. Katsuragi & His Super Solenoids             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 11, 2007 5:07 pm The S2 Engine has been mentioned in threads before, such as these: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1608 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=676 But humor me a bit, if you would... As part of a fanfic endeavor of mine, I need to come up with something resembling an explanation for the S2 Engine's working principles, or just what exactly the S2 Theory proposes. Even if it's total bullshit, it at least has to sound plausible in the bullshit-science world of NGE. Problem is, I really suck at physics, and I need to do a lot of reading before those websites on perpetual motion and free energy make anything beyond an iota of sense. So I figured that, in the meantime, I might ask for help/ideas from those who know better. It's never explained how the S2 Engine works, although here's a list of "things we (sorta kinda maybe) know": entails "unlimited energy" CI equates "unlimited energy" to "helical/spiral/etc. energy" and says something like, "As the world is formed with spirals, the engine acquires energy from its shape, which is the same as DNA." Whatever the hell that means. At the very least, it's letting us know that the double-helix deal is important. Might the name "Super Solenoid", beyond relating to the double- helical structure, be implying that its operating principles have something to do with RL solenoids? Described in Chronicle as a perpetual motion device/machine ( eikyuu kikan ). (Not that people needed Chronicle to figure this out, looking at those threads.) The show implies that there is some connection between the S2 Engine and the Dirac Sea (which in turn involves string theory or something). Zuggy thinks the S2 Engine has something to do with toruses. E.g., Ramiel's "torus reactor", Armisael's "double-helix donut" shape, etc. Egad. How can all of this be turned into relatively cohesive-sounding nonsense I can have Dr. Katsuragi spout at will? As I understand it, this perpetual motion / free energy stuff gets scoffed at on account of breaking the laws of physics, and Dr. Katsuragi would invariably get gutted by the scientific community. (The show seems to imply that wasn't taken very seriously, in fact.) But, out of curiosity, IS there actually a way that something like the S2 Theory could work without breaking anything? I'm naive, I know, but it would be fun to at least have some "reason" explaining why Dr. Katsuragi is right -- and everyone else sucked. On a related note, I need to "reverse engineer" Dr. K's official profession from the S2 Theory. The super solenoid seems like a personal obsession of his, not the sort of thing he'd have been doing from the start -- nor, I assume, something he would have been able to pursue without needing to do " real " work on the side. What particular profession would create an "intellectual environment" where something like the S2 might emerge? For my own purposes, I've already settled on him being an academic over here . (Kyoto: It's where all the cool people go.) But that still leaves the task of assigning him to an existing (or totally nonexistent) subdivision. That's it -- for now.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Nov 11, 2007 6:09 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 11, 2007 6:37 pm Zeruel wrote: Are you implying that I suffer from MPD, muthafucka?!?

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sun Nov 11, 2007 7:42 pm You might want to check out Gurren Lagann now since it reuses this spiral energy (universe is made of spirals: from DNA to galaxies) concept extensively. I was going to post more, but I'm probably useless for this.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Nov 11, 2007 8:05 pm Never mind this garbage about the world being made of spirals, I'd say a spiral engine would be some sort of constant amplifier in a sense. If particles are being accelerated through a spiral engine, constantly accelerating in a loop under an energy source, say...maybe a massive magnetic field of some sort...then... No, scratch that. Use something a little funky, like drawing energy from quantum-foam wormholes using superluminal (i.e. faster than light) quantum data transfer between two streams of electrons to alter the...blah blah blah...state of waveform matter via white-hole energy production to...blah blah..... Aack. This is a nightmare to cook up for someone else. I can think up a process in mind, but can't put it in a post easily enough. There's real-life evidence that there might be some communication between electrons that goes faster than light, and there's a lot of talk about string theory and wormholes that form at subatomic levels, and so on. And there's the hypothetical "white hole", the counterpart of the infamous black hole, which, instead of sucking things into a singularity, keeps throwing things out. Assuming that quantum interaction results in the formation of a region of three-dimensional, double helical space conductive to the formation of subatomic white holes that release energized particles along known vectors to cause instantaneous acceleration of small particle waveform matter (PWM), we have for ourselves a device that can accelerate matter potentially infinitely, with gain(energy output per cycle) controllable through magnetic field manipulation. (Talk about pedantry...phew!)

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Nov 11, 2007 8:09 pm I'd suggest finding a hardcore Trekie to trade ideas with, for as far as I can tell the Dirac Sea has some relation to Antimatter particles (the positron, for example was first described as a 'hole in the dirac sea' ), and Antimatter is something used extensively in the Star Trek universe, including as an energy source. Also, here is an article on Antimatter drives you might find helpful: http://ffden-2.phys.uaf.edu/213.web.stuff/Scott%20Kircher/antimatter.html As for the doc's professional background, perhaps something in the development of the spacecraft that are to infact utilize these drives. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 11, 2007 8:46 pm Szmitten wrote: You might want to check out Gurren Lagann now since it reuses this spiral energy (universe is made of spirals: from DNA to galaxies) concept extensively.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Nov 11, 2007 9:36 pm I am also completely ignorant in this area, but my suggestion would be to just make crap up and then, even if it's based on something real, dumb it down so average folk can understand it. We don't need technical details about how something works as long as we're told that it does work. I'd likely cook something up about how energy is transferred from the soul to the S2 and in a biological equivalent of a magnet, it is shot through it at the speed of light and its shape (double helical, like DNA) help perpetuate the motion. This allows for the creation of new matter (healing) and the release of such energy that works as weapons. Now, I just made that up off the top of my head, and if you tell it to someone that doesn't know crap about science, they'll buy it within the context of a SF world.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 11, 2007 10:08 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: my suggestion would be to just make crap up and then ... dumb it down so average folk can understand it.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Nov 11, 2007 11:11 pm Since the Dirac Sea is apparently closely connected in some way to the S2 Engine, I really do think that the concept of Rei mentioning that she and Shinji are inside the S2 Engine at one point in the Another Cases game should be considered to have some importance. I know all that about keeping each canon separate and all that, but I just feel that this sort of thing is somewhat different. Anno was extensively involved with the game, and I don't see why something like that statement would be made up for the game with no application or relevance to anything outside it.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Nov 11, 2007 11:45 pm Where is Zuggy when you need him?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 11, 2007 11:57 pm NAveryW wrote: Since the Dirac Sea is apparently closely connected in some way to the S2 Engine, I really do think that the concept of Rei mentioning that she and Shinji are inside the S2 Engine at one point in the Another Cases game should be considered to have some importance.

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Mon Nov 12, 2007 12:00 am Fortunately, NGE techno-babble leaves you with a lot to work with. Not like Star Trek techno-babble. How the hell does a Heisenberg compensator work? Anyway, here are some ideas I’ve been throwing around which may be applicable to your question. From what we are shown it would be safe to assume that the AT field is responsible for giving form and structure to biomass. For this argument it doesn’t matter if we’re talking about LCL derived flesh or the particle-wave matter of angels. Ritsuko makes it clear to us that both exhibit near identical characteristics. The AT field is a native characteristic of the soul. The presence of a soul gives structure to flesh. On a molecular level this has a helical structure. By this I mean DNA. This suggests to me that helical energy might be the native energy of the soul. The AT field would thus be derived from helical energy. It physically manifests into helical shapes. The S^2 engine, DNA, and the Lance of Longinus for example. The power and influence of an entity might correlate to the amount of helical energy it derives (or amplifies?) from its native soul. The Lance is a near pure conduit of this energy which would explain why it is close to a god. This also explains its structure as it manifests helical energy in an almost pure form. I believe the idea of helical energy being perpetual has more to do with biology than physics. DNA is a helical molecule that is self-perpetuating. So long as energy is put into a biological system it will perpetuate forever. The S^2 engine represents a more perfect example of this. It operates on a more precise level and thus can potentially derive infinite energy from the matter and energy surrounding it. Even the void of space has matter and energy present in it. Because of this the S^2 engine could never be “starved” regardless of where it is. Ultimately, all of this is a manifestation of the soul which is potentially immortal and perpetual. The S^2 engine could be described as a flawless DNA-like device able to convert matter to energy 100% by virtue of it’s perfect structure. This process would be homologous to how metabolic functions derive ATP from carbohydrates which in turn power the metabolism of the organism and allow it to consume more carbohydrates. Metabolism works something like this. [DNA => RNA => protein] Perhaps within the S^2 engine is a structure or component similar to RNA which catalyzes a matter/antimatter reaction instead of a protein. This would result in the complete conversion of mass to energy. The reaction is 100% and generates no waste. This is actually scientific fact. The S^2 engine violates physical laws only in terms of what we’re used to. Arthur C. Clarke always said that technology of sufficient advancement becomes indistinguishable from magic. Not only are S^2 engines indistinguishable from magic but they are machines indistinguishable from organs. This is because as machines become more efficient they begin to resemble organic systems. Trying to explain the exact operating principles of the engine would be like trying to explain how the monoliths in 2010 turn Jupiter into a miniature star. Imagine trying to explain the workings of a light bulb to someone who lived 3000 years ago. This is the nature of god-like technology. “The world is formed with spirals” may refer to helical energy being the fundamental structure of souls and thus the structure through which perpetual energy (immortality?) manifests. It may also suggest that helical energy is latent to the universe and that souls are merely concentrated, cohesive points of helical energy. I hope this venture wasn’t completely meaningless.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 12, 2007 12:16 am Random little comments since I in no way am possessed of enough brains to contemplate the above at the moment. (Though some of it gives me Zuggy flashbacks.) Skullraper wrote: I believe the idea of helical energy being perpetual has more to do with biology than physics.

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Mon Nov 12, 2007 12:44 am NGE’s ambiguous nature permits endless possibilities for nitpicking. The distinction between biology and physics is rendered very vague in the show. I guess that’s where metaphysical biology comes from. I’m sorry my rampant speculation wasn’t of more use. I believe it’s called “fan wanking”? I can at least say with certainty that matter/antimatter reactions yield a 100% conversion of matter to energy. For the S^2 engine to procure energy without generating waste it would have to utilize this process somehow. BTW, what’s a Zuggy?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Nov 12, 2007 12:46 am Skullraper wrote: BTW, what’s a Zuggy?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 12, 2007 1:00 am Skullraper wrote: NGE’s ambiguous nature permits endless possibilities for nitpicking. The distinction between biology and physics is rendered very vague in the show. I guess that’s where metaphysical biology comes from.

[]:             Quote Post by Sceleris » Tue Nov 13, 2007 11:31 pm Frontier Scientist Magazine, March 1997 (Superstring feature issue), pg. 46-47: "A Revolution in Energy?" (excerpt) "[...] Katsuragi's 'supersolenoid theory' is so called because it arises naturally from superstring theory (which itself comes from ' supersymmetry ') of the third revolution , and the concept of solenoids . [...] The supersolenoid in this case is not a metal wire or something that tangible, but a pair of two-dimensional Planck length -sized structures in the shape of coils, composed of series of open-ended, one-dimensional quantum strings seamlessly held together through an energy disproportionality (basically resembling magnetism). When these supersolenoids move through universal space-time (or more generally, the bulk ), they amass potential energy as the double-helix shaped, bound-together structure prevents the individual strings from vibrating, whereas a normal string, either open- or close-ended, changes its parameters when gaining energy: Either its 'size' or its amplitude changes. Therefore, the supersolenoids are the most energy-filled entities that can be described by modern physics, and possibly the most energy-filled entities possible at all -- the mathematics of supersolenoids begin to break down when dealing with higher string coupling constants (i.e. torus shaped strings). Supersolenoids come to be when two pairs of open-ended strings of the same amplitude A collide. For each pair, two ends attract, and the other two ends repel, decreasing the amplitude with 50% in the process. The interlocking of the pairs give it a double-helix shape. This supersolenoid then grows when colliding with two strings of amplitude A/2, ending up with total amplitude of A/4. As the number of strings making up the helix structures increases, the total amplitude approaches zero, and the statistical possibility of colliding with a string of the same amplitude also approaches zero, effectively limiting the size of supersolenoids. However, its amplitude is not zero, but close to it. In fact, zero-amplitude strings do exist, and do occasionally collide with supersolenoids, causing their amassed potential energy to become unevenly distributed and breaking it apart. These free, energized strings then change parameters accordingly. The zero-amplitude strings mentioned are closely related to gravitation . This concept is put to practical use in the supersolenoid engine: The core of the engine is a focused gravitational wave generator, which uses ultrahigh frequency pulsed particle beams on energizable elements, mostly composed of heavy nuclei , to expel gravitational waves with a superposition in the engine fuel chamber, where the density of zero-amplitude strings is increased drastically. Immediate collisions with existing supersolenoids release the potential energy, which increases the mean-energy of all matter in the chamber (as in vibrational and kinetic energy of molecules). Meanwhile, the gravitational waves also lead to a moderate influx of supersolenoids from the bulk and nearby branes, constantly 'refilling the fuel tank'. The energy may be used in a generator, for example a magnetohydrodynamic dynamo , which may then be used to power the gravitational wave generator with energy surplus, virtually making the supersolenoid engine a perpetuum mobile . (Virtually, since energy is conserved in the bulk; the observable universe, however, experiences an increase in total energy.) [...] If the engine chamber is not perfectly sealed, there is a microscopic but non-zero risk of a supersolenoid breaking out in a chain reaction. Such a chain reaction may affect a great surrounding radius, breaking down or converting all matter into different forms or energy, or perhaps opening a sea of Dirac (named after, but not to be confused with, the Dirac sea ), which may be likened to a dimensional converter or portal where matter can escape the universal brane. The existence of seas of Dirac is highly theoretical, however, and extremely unlikely. [...]" (How's that for a BS explanation?)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Nov 14, 2007 12:02 am Nice, but how come I'm unable to find ANY results on Google for Frontier Scientist Magazine ? Are you sure you didn't make this whole thing up?

Article: Dr Katsuragi and His Super Solenoids
7 (Superstring feature issue), pg. 46-47: "A Revolution in Energy?" (excerpt) "[...] Katsuragi's 'supersolenoid theory' is so called because it arises naturally from superstring theory (which itself comes from ' supersymmetry ') of the third revolution , and the concept of solenoids . [...] The supersolenoid in this case is not a metal wire or something that tangible, but a pair of two-dimensional Planck length -sized structures in the shape of coils, composed of series of open-ended, one-dimensional quantum strings seamlessly held together through an energy disproportionality (basically resembling magnetism). When these supersolenoids move through universal space-time (or more generally, the bulk ), they amass potential energy as the double-helix shaped, bound-together structure prevents the individual strings from vibrating, whereas a normal string, either open- or close-ended, changes its parameters when gaining energy: Either its 'size' or its amplitude changes. Therefore, the supersolenoids are the most energy-filled entities that can be described by modern physics, and possibly the most energy-filled entities possible at all -- the mathematics of supersolenoids begin to break down when dealing with higher string coupling constants (i.e. torus shaped strings). Supersolenoids come to be when two pairs of open-ended strings of the same amplitude A collide. For each pair, two ends attract, and the other two ends repel, decreasing the amplitude with 50% in the process. The interlocking of the pairs give it a double-helix shape. This supersolenoid then grows when colliding with two strings of amplitude A/2, ending up with total amplitude of A/4. As the number of strings making up the helix structures increases, the total amplitude approaches zero, and the statistical possibility of colliding with a string of the same amplitude also approaches zero, effectively limiting the size of supersolenoids. However, its amplitude is not zero, but close to it. In fact, zero-amplitude strings do exist, and do occasionally collide with supersolenoids, causing their amassed potential energy to become unevenly distributed and breaking it apart. These free, energized strings then change parameters accordingly. The zero-amplitude strings mentioned are closely related to gravitation . This concept is put to practical use in the supersolenoid engine: The core of the engine is a focused gravitational wave generator, which uses ultrahigh frequency pulsed particle beams on energizable elements, mostly composed of

Article: Dr Katsuragi and His Super Solenoids
 closely related to gravitation . This concept is put to practical use in the supersolenoid engine: The core of the engine is a focused gravitational wave generator, which uses ultrahigh frequency pulsed particle beams on energizable elements, mostly composed of heavy nuclei , to expel gravitational waves with a superposition in the engine fuel chamber, where the density of zero-amplitude strings is increased drastically. Immediate collisions with existing supersolenoids release the potential energy, which increases the mean-energy of all matter in the chamber (as in vibrational and kinetic energy of molecules). Meanwhile, the gravitational waves also lead to a moderate influx of supersolenoids from the bulk and nearby branes, constantly 'refilling the fuel tank'. The energy may be used in a generator, for example a magnetohydrodynamic dynamo , which may then be used to power the gravitational wave generator with energy surplus, virtually making the supersolenoid engine a perpetuum mobile . (Virtually, since energy is conserved in the bulk; the observable universe, however, experiences an increase in total energy.) [...] If the engine chamber is not perfectly sealed, there is a microscopic but non-zero risk of a supersolenoid breaking out in a chain reaction. Such a chain reaction may affect a great surrounding radius, breaking down or converting all matter into different forms or energy, or perhaps opening a sea of Dirac (named after, but not to be confused with, the Dirac sea ), which may be likened to a dimensional converter or portal where matter can escape the universal brane. The existence of seas of Dirac is highly theoretical, however, and extremely unlikely. [...]" (How's that for a BS explanation?)
